accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: These checks highlight opportunities to improve the accessibility of your web app. Only a subset of accessibility issues can be automatically detected by Lighthouse, so manual testing is also encouraged.

aria-allowed-attr.description: ARIA attributes are allowed for an element's role

color-contrast.description: Background and foreground colors have a sufficient contrast ratio

html-has-lang.description: HTML element has a lang attribute

list.description: Lists contain only <li> elements and script supporting elements
